title: Bootstrap Libraries Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of React-Bootstrap/Reactstrap/BootstrapVue and 왜 eliminating the jQuery requirement is a major benefit.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the primarily benefit of using React-Bootstrap or BootstrapVue instead of 'raw' Bootstrap?
options: They re-implement Bootstrap components as native framework components, eliminating the need for jQuery.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.

questions.question: Which popular React library provides Bootstrap components as a declarative set of React components?
Do BootstrapVue components use the standard Vue reactivity system internally?
options: Yes, they are built specifically for the Vue.js ecosystem.
No, they are built on raw HTML.

questions.question: Does using a declarative UI component like <Button variant='primary'> improve code maintainability compared to manual DOM classes?
options: Yes, as it is more intuitive and follows modern frontend patterns.

questions.question: Raw Bootstrap typically relies on which JavaScript library by default (unless using a framework-specific version)?
